_scale: 2px per inch, origin offset (200,200). Room: 322" wide, 260" tall. Top hallway 75", right hallway 96".
_coord_note: All x/y in JSON pixel space (2px per inch). Origin (200,200) = room top-left corner of outer bounding box. boresight_deg: 0=right/east, 90=down/south, 180=left/west, 270=up/north.

tx._label: Transmitter — 32" right of door, 0.5" into room, facing hallway

rx._label: Receiver — 64" right of TX, 0.5" into room, facing hallway

walls._label: Inner right vertical wall – room/hallway divider (185")
Gray wall column – top (28.5", inside room)
Gray wall column – right (28.5", flush with inner right wall)
